title: Blue's Better Monsters
description: New models and animations, shapeshifting creepers, dismemberment and more!
body:
**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1017176/description_1b484d44-6f84-4b05-9258-b4377e972df2.gif)**
*READ BEFORE USING* **This resource pack works for minecraft versions 1.21.9 and below down to version 1.19.2.**   Blue's Better Monsters updates hostile mobs to be more realistic. Hostile mobs have new, fully animated models and textures and new features that improve on the classic minecraft monsters.
At the moment the following mobs are affected:

Zombies
Skeletons
Creepers
Spiders
Witches

  This resource pack adds the following standout features: 

![Dismemberment](https://i.imgur.com/JOCgnyc.png) ![Reanimated](https://i.imgur.com/OAhqRoN.png) ![Mimic creepers](https://i.imgur.com/DzFLyW7.png) ![Flying witches](https://i.imgur.com/yVd6bph.png) ![Dangling spiders](https://i.imgur.com/VYSVZi6.png) ![Randomized deaths](https://i.imgur.com/0csL026.png)   ![](https://i.imgur.com/s32C7H2.png)
GIFs of the features described above: ![](https://i.imgur.com/sk9jNut.gif) A creeper disguised as a zombie turning back into a creeper as it approaches the player ![](https://i.imgur.com/10nPfvE.gif) A skeleton showing new walking and attack animations ![](https://i.imgur.com/zH3iLpO.gif) A zombie losing its dismemberable body parts ![](https://i.imgur.com/MQFQzeD.gif) A zombie showing the randomized death animations ![](https://i.imgur.com/G4KV7WW.gif) A spider dangling from the ceiling and then losing some of its legs ![](https://i.imgur.com/NzfJevJ.gif) A witch jumping on a broom
*TEXT VERSION OF THE DESCRIPTION IN SPOILER FOR WHEN THE IMAGES DON'T LOAD*
TEXT VERSION OF DESCRIPTION **DISMEMBERMENT** If you deal enough damage to a mob before it dies, there's a chance that its limbs might fall off. * * * **REANIMATED** Mobs have been fully reanimated - Animations for idling, walking, attacks and death are more realistic than before. Baby zombies are turned into crawling zombies. * * * **MIMIC CREEPERS** Some creepers camouflage themselves by taking the shape of other mobs. Disguised creepers show subtle signs that can give away their disguise. * * * **FLYING WITCHES**
Witches jump on their broom when they have low HP. They then fly away when killed. * * * **DANGLING SPIDERS**
Spiders climb walls by dangling from the ceiling. Spiders can lose their legs and dynamically adjust their way of walking * * * **RANDOMIZED DEATHS** Mob death animations are randomized to make every kill unique.
